description: Add summary field to all tool definitions in the Figma (10 tools), Confluence (14 tools), and e2e-test (27 tools) plugins.

userStories.title: Add summary to all Figma plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 10 Figma plugin tools to have short human-readable summaries so the side panel shows concise descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 10 defineTool calls in plugins/figma/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/figma && npm run build passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 10 files in `plugins/figma/src/tools/`. Examples:

- `create-file.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new design file'`
- `get-file.ts`: `summary: 'Get metadata for a file'`
- `list-files.ts`: `summary: 'List files in a folder or project'`
- `list-recent-files.ts`: `summary: 'List recently accessed files'`
- `list-teams.ts`: `summary: 'List teams the user belongs to'`
- `trash-file.ts`: `summary: 'Move a file to the trash'`

IMPORTANT: This PRD depends on the SDK change (separate PRD) being merged first.

userStories.title: Add summary to all Confluence plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 14 Confluence plugin tools to have short human-readable summaries so the side panel shows concise descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 14 defineTool calls in plugins/confluence/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/confluence && npm run build passes
cd plugins/confluence && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/confluence && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/confluence && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 14 files in `plugins/confluence/src/tools/`. Examples:

- `create-page.ts`: `summary: 'Create a new Confluence page'`
- `get-page.ts`: `summary: 'Get a page by ID'`
- `search.ts`: `summary: 'Search content using CQL'`
- `list-spaces.ts`: `summary: 'List Confluence spaces'`
- `update-page.ts`: `summary: 'Update an existing page'`
- `add-label.ts`: `summary: 'Add a label to a page'`

userStories.title: Add summary to all e2e-test plugin tool definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all 27 e2e-test plugin tools to have summary fields for consistency, even though they are test tools.
acceptanceCriteria: All 27 defineTool calls in plugins/e2e-test/src/tools/*.ts have a `summary` field
Each summary is 1 short sentence, under 80 characters
The existing `description` field is NOT changed
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Edit all 27 files in `plugins/e2e-test/src/tools/`. These are test tools so summaries can be straightforward. Examples:

- `echo.ts`: `summary: 'Echo a message back'`
- `greet.ts`: `summary: 'Greet a person by name'`
- `get-status.ts`: `summary: 'Get test server status'`
- `failing-tool.ts`: `summary: 'A tool that always fails'`
- `slow-with-progress.ts`: `summary: 'Sleep and report progress'`
- `sdk-fetch-json.ts`: `summary: 'Test SDK fetchJSON'`
- `error-auth.ts`: `summary: 'Throw an auth error'`

For e2e-test tools, many descriptions are already very short and the summary can be identical. The goal is consistency — every tool in the repo has a summary field.

qualityChecks: cd plugins/figma && npm run check && cd ../confluence && npm run check && cd ../e2e-test && npm run check
